one_law: WTM (world target model) and SourceA Forge share one north star — controlled agentic execution with receipt truth before LLM reasoning.
shared_goals: Understanding before action — receipts and world model before LLM
SCAN → PICK → PROVE on every factory lane
Cloud execution only — Mac = control panel
Honest tier labels — mock_only · freemium_cap · production
Route plans to destination repos without cross-lane bleed

phase_alignment.wtm_phase_c: Runtime stack C1–C7 — plan → verify → route → repair → orchestrate
phase_alignment.wtm_phase_d: Pre-LLM world model D1–D16 — llm_context_packet before reasoning

unify_actions: Hub WTM tab shows Forge funnel metrics when forge-bay receipt exists
Forge pipeline destination_repo aligns with WTM product_routes (Noetfield · TrustField · Forge · WitnessBC)
Single queue_sa line across factory-now · WTM LIVE NOW · Forge run receipts
